title: Dash & Roll
description: Add Dash (or Roll) mechanic to minecraft
body:
# **CoffeeG's**-Dash & Roll
> Add Dodge,Dash/Roll mechanic to minecraft

Improvement version of a datapack in planetminecraft by mmarkov100
This datapack is in-development so it's lacks of something, I'm porting and patching it to works in older version (below 1.18).
## How to use
Default is jump mode, jump first and then press shift(you can press w,a,s,d to change dash position after press shift). If you are using CoffeeG's Double Jump, to dash you must sneek for a time and press shift.

**Warning: Please use Version 1.0.2 or above, old versions use diffirent technique to use**

## Compatible 

This datapack works well with almost every datapack

## Try my other datapacks:
+ [**CoffeeG's Useful Snowball**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/usefulsnowball) - Useful Snowball! Make snowball slows mob.
+ [**CoffeeG's Double Jump**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffdoublejump) - Add Double Jump and Leap mechanic to minecraft with sneak button!
+ [**CoffeeG's Wall Climbing**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffwallclimb) - Add Wall Climb (Wall Jump) mechanic to minecraft
